div.div:
Brain of Yoda
- Implements a REST API
- Module of Authentication using bcrypt or argon2
- Implement permissions (sessions)
- Submissions and code management (files or plain text)
- Admin Panel(Webauth max. permission)
-User with privilege (twostep/2FA)
- User
- Show result
